topic: Memory file quality issues in generate-context.js JSON mode

priorResearch: 5 root causes identified from 012 pre-release audit memory save quality review

noveltyJustification: 8 of 12 findings were new — mapped active vs latent contamination paths, discovered post-filter reinjection, FOLDER_STOPWORDS gaps, ensureMin fallback reintroduction
Mapped raw JSON fields end-to-end showing which become synthetic prompt, which stay observations, which never reach summarizer. Identified exchanges and toolCalls as highest enrichment targets.
Produced ADR evaluating 5 approaches with regression risks. Mapped existing test coverage across 5 test suites. Combined architecture recommended with 5-step implementation sequence.
